convergent_lesson: A regular local selector is a finite-jet natural operator, while a persistent local splitting must survive the curvature-and-derivative holonomy algebra.
udt_use: Local selector search can be made finite and adversarial.
firewall_limit: No theorem chooses the output type or supplies a physical selector.

convergent_lesson: Curvature transport, holonomy reduction, bundle existence, and global gluing are distinct layers.
udt_use: Test local invariant subspaces before asking for cocycles and quotient completion.
firewall_limit: Local projector transport cannot select a cap, seam, quotient, or carrier.

convergent_lesson: A representative or spectrum may exist without being unique, and spectral data can fail to determine geometry.
udt_use: A scale-selector claim needs a derived operator, boundary data, objective, and degeneracy audit.
firewall_limit: No Yamabe or spectral theorem provides UDT's physical scale.

convergent_lesson: A differential equation need not be variational; a local Lagrangian need not globalize; a differentiable generator needs boundary data and may lack an integrable charge.
udt_use: Action, variation domain, boundary completion, and mass charge must be audited as one closure chain.
firewall_limit: GR boundary terms and charges are comparison controls only.

convergent_lesson: Fixed-point and eigenvalue theorems presuppose a map/operator, a domain, topology, compactness, and boundary conditions.
udt_use: Bootstrap must first be typed as an explicit whole-solution map.
firewall_limit: Existence theory does not invent the bootstrap operation or make it unique.

convergent_lesson: Evolution, constraints, characteristics, gauge, and boundary flux form a coupled PDE specification.
udt_use: Time-live work is premature until a native principal symbol and incoming seal data exist.
firewall_limit: Ricci flow, harmonic-map flow, and Einstein evolution remain prohibited imports.

convergent_lesson: Hopf topology certifies a supplied global map, while soliton existence and stability additionally require a supplied functional and boundary class.
udt_use: Keep quotient/map selection separate from carrier/action/stability.
firewall_limit: Topology alone does not derive the S2 carrier or L2+L4 dynamics.

convergent_lesson: Across every family, compatibility and existence are weaker than physical realization or selection.
udt_use: The smallest missing object remains an operational selector relation with typed domain and codomain.
firewall_limit: The survey cannot name or invent that relation from analogy.
